title: Managed LLM Platforms — Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure OpenAI

questions.question: Before this lesson, which platform would you reach for first if a customer needed Claude, Llama, and Cohere behind one API?
questions.question_zh: 在学这一课之前，如果客户需要在同一个 API 后面用上 Claude、Llama 和 Cohere，你会优先选哪个平台？

questions.question: Which hyperscaler's bet is described as exclusive partnership rather than marketplace?
questions.question_zh: 哪家超大规模云厂商的押注被描述为独家合作而非模型市场？

questions.question: Roughly what is the measured median TTFT gap between Azure OpenAI (with PTUs) and Bedrock on-demand on Llama 3.1 405B equivalents?
questions.question_zh: 在 Llama 3.1 405B 同级别模型上，Azure OpenAI（用 PTU）和 Bedrock 按需模式之间实测的 TTFT 中位数大致差多少？

questions.question: Which Bedrock 2025 feature gives the cleanest per-product cost attribution natively in CloudWatch?
questions.question_zh: Bedrock 2025 年的哪个功能能在 CloudWatch 原生提供最干净的按产品成本归因？

questions.question: Azure PTUs typically break even versus on-demand at what sustained utilization band?
questions.question_zh: Azure PTU 相对于按需模式的盈亏平衡点大致落在哪个持续利用率区间？

questions.question: Why is the lesson's recommended 2026 policy a two-provider minimum for product-critical LLM calls?
questions.question_zh: 为什么课程在 2026 年的推荐策略是：产品关键路径上的 LLM 调用至少要接两家供应商？
options: It is required by SOC 2 Type II
Frontier model leadership rotates monthly, so single-vendor lock-in shuts you out of two-thirds of the frontier
Hyperscalers refuse to sign BAAs unless you also use a competitor
Single-vendor pricing is always more expensive
options_zh: 前沿模型的领跑者每个月都在轮换，单一厂商锁定意味着你被排除在 2/3 的前沿之外
超大规模云不和你签 BAA，除非你同时用一家竞品
单一厂商定价总是更贵

questions.question: Which statement best describes the FinOps surface across the three platforms?
questions.question_zh: 下列哪句话最能概括三家平台的 FinOps 体验？
options: Azure is cleanest native, Bedrock is opaque
Vertex has no attribution surface at all
All three expose identical per-request attribution
Bedrock is cleanest native, Vertex is most flexible via BigQuery, Azure is most opaque without instrumentation
options_zh: Azure 原生最干净，Bedrock 不透明
Vertex 完全没有归因接口
三家暴露的按请求归因完全一致
Bedrock 原生最干净，Vertex 通过 BigQuery 最灵活，Azure 在不打点的情况下最不透明
